sentence: 祠堂里供着祖先的神位。
pinyin: Cítáng lǐ gòng zhe zǔxiān de shénwèi.
english: The ancestral tablets are enshrined in the family hall.

sentence: 这家餐厅是私营企业，经营得很好。
pinyin: Zhè jiā cāntīng shì sīyíng qǐyè, jīngyíng de hěn hǎo.
english: This restaurant is a privately-owned business and is doing very well.

sentence: 两国签署了双边贸易协议。
pinyin: Liǎng guó qiānshǔ le shuāngbiān màoyì xiéyì.
english: The two countries signed a bilateral trade agreement.

sentence: 他辞掉工作，打算自己做生意。
pinyin: Tā cí diào gōngzuò, dǎsuàn zìjǐ zuò shēng yì.
english: He quit his job and plans to go into business for himself.

sentence: 师傅用机器把钢板切割成小块。
pinyin: Shīfu yòng jīqì bǎ gāngbǎn qiēgē chéng xiǎo kuài.
english: The worker used a machine to cut the steel plate into small pieces.
